messages.helpHint: Type help to show command help again.

electronRequired: Bitte fГјhren Sie diese Funktion in der Electron-Desktop-Anwendung aus

render.desc: Projekt rendern, Verwendung: render [project|yaml] [Projektname oder ID]
render.noProject: Kein Projekt angegeben. Verwenden Sie: render project <Projektname oder ID>

label.desc: Etiketten drucken, Verwendung: label <Projektname oder ID>
label.noProject: Kein Projekt ausgewГӨhlt, Verwendung: label <Projektname oder ID>

terminal: Note: this is an in-app shortcut terminal, not a system shell. It wraps common project, render, and label operations.
For the full CLI, open your system terminal, enter the backend directory, and run: python main.py <command>.
help cli                     Show main.py CLI usage
select <name or ID>          Select a project
render project <ID|all>      Render configuration, e.g. render project 1
render yaml <ID|all>         Generate YAML, e.g. render yaml 1,2
render project <ID> --format device_sn  Output config files by SN
render yaml <ID> --format device_sn     Output YAML files by SN
ID format: 1 means one project, 1,2,3 means multiple projects, and all means all projects.
Type help cli for more CLI examples.
cli: Run from the backend directory in your system terminal / PowerShell:
